modelStats.title: AI Prediction System
modelStats.subtitle: Our prediction engine uses multiple specialized AI models working together
modelStats.verifiedResults: Verified backtest results on completed matches
modelStats.step1: Each model independently analyzes the match using its specialized approach
modelStats.step2: Models are weighted based on historical accuracy
modelStats.step3: Our proprietary system combines predictions for optimal accuracy
modelStats.step4: Final probabilities are calibrated for reliability
modelStats.trackingDesc: Weekly performance backtests verify our predictions against actual match results. Accuracy metrics will appear here once we have enough verified data.
modelStats.leagueBreakdownDesc: How our models perform across different competitions
modelStats.liveMetricsSoon: Live accuracy metrics will be available once the system has processed enough predictions to generate meaningful statistics.
